name: ecp-digital-bank
description: ECP Digital Bank — Full-stack banking application

scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix server run test && npm --prefix web run test
scripts.test:watch: concurrently "npm --prefix server run test:watch" "npm --prefix web run test:watch"
scripts.lint: npm --prefix server run lint && npm --prefix web run lint
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix web install
